issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and inaccurate. Effect requires: (1) look at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) filter for {Animal Kingdom Pirates} type cards excluding [Who's.Who], (3) reveal up to 1 card, (4) add to hand, (5) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL has no filter specification, no card limit (up to 1), and no handling of remaining cards.
Filter must specify: type={Animal Kingdom Pirates}, exclude=[Who's.Who], and limit to top 5 cards of deck. Current filter is {kind:Any} which is incorrect.
Missing action for placing non-selected cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only handles the card added to hand.
